content.description: Content sync definition bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.

notes: Managed via entity registry + sync admin.

tables.name: gate.ContentType
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT contentTypeId AS [contentTypeId] FROM gate.Content WHERE contentId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[contentTypeId] = [gate].[ContentType].[contentTypeId])

tables.name: gate.Content
tables.predicate: contentId IN ({ids})

tables.name: gate.ContentLinkType
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT contentLinkTypeId AS [contentLinkTypeId] FROM gate.ContentLink WHERE contentId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[contentLinkTypeId] = [gate].[ContentLinkType].[contentLinkTypeId])

tables.name: gate.ContentLink
tables.predicate: contentId IN ({ids})

tables.name: gate.UserGroupPermission
tables.predicate: contentId IN ({ids})

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected content scope.

metadata.description: The metadataSync step runs in a single SQL transaction on the target: applies the change set (MERGE/DELETE with FK handling). This is the only transactional metadata apply.
metadata.orderingHint: Exactly one metadataSync per flow; marks the split between pre- and post-metadata execution.

postMetadata.description: Deploy actions, HTTP calls, dependency refresh, pipeline start, and post-deploy audits. Most steps warn on failure but allow the run to complete.
postMetadata.orderingHint: All steps after the first metadataSync step.

metadataSync.description: Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

objectName.description: Dependency object name string (e.g. content, rule). Typed on each flow step.

planEntityId.description: Numeric id of the entity being synced (contractId, datasetId, ruleId, …). Same for every step in the run.

contract.description: Contract sync definition bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.

notes: Managed via entity registry + sync admin.

tables.name: core.Contract
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.ContractColumn
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.Dataset
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.DatasetMapping
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT datasetId AS [datasetId] FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[datasetId] = [core].[DatasetMapping].[datasetId_Left])

tables.name: core.DatasetColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT datasetId AS [datasetId] FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[datasetId] = [core].[DatasetColumn].[datasetId])

tables.name: core.DatasetMappingColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM core.DatasetMapping WHERE datasetId_Left IN (SELECT datasetId FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id})) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[datasetMappingId] = [core].[DatasetMappingColumn].[datasetMappingId])

tables.name: core.Pipeline
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.Activity
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT pipelineId AS [pipelineId] FROM core.Pipeline WHERE contractId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[pipelineId] = [core].[Activity].[pipelineId])

tables.name: core.Rule
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Dataset] p WHERE p.datasetId = [core].[Rule].inputDatasetId AND p.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.Step
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Pipeline] p WHERE p.pipelineId = [core].[Step].pipelineId AND p.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleColumn
tables.predicate: (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleColumn].inputDatasetColumnId)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Contract] AS __mia_root WHERE __mia_root.[contractId] = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleCondition
tables.predicate: (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleCondition].inputDatasetColumnId)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Contract] AS __mia_root WHERE __mia_root.[contractId] = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleLink
tables.predicate: (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleLink].outputDatasetColumnId)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Contract] AS __mia_root WHERE __mia_root.[contractId] = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleCondition] p WHERE p.ruleConditionId = [core].[RuleConditionValue].ruleConditionId)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Contract] AS __mia_root WHERE __mia_root.[contractId] = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

steps.title: Audit check (before sync)
steps.description: Source uspAuditRunCheck — decide whether metadata sync should run.

steps.title: Target lock
steps.description: Lock the target contract deployment window.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected contract scope.

steps.title: Pipeline register
steps.description: Register affected pipelines with the target agent service.

steps.title: Contract undeploy
steps.description: Undeploy the target contract before redeployment.

steps.title: Audit check (before deploy)
steps.description: Re-run source audit after undeploy, before physical dataset creation.

preTransaction.description: Steps run on the source database before the metadata sync transaction opens on the target. Typical uses: audit gates (syncOrNot), contract locks. Failures here stop the entire run.
preTransaction.orderingHint: Must appear before the first metadataSync step in the flow array.

metadata.description: The metadataSync step runs in a single SQL transaction on the target: applies the change set (MERGE/DELETE with FK handling). This is the only transactional metadata apply.
metadata.orderingHint: Exactly one metadataSync per flow; marks the split between pre- and post-metadata execution.

postMetadata.description: Deploy actions, HTTP calls, dependency refresh, pipeline start, and post-deploy audits. Most steps warn on failure but allow the run to complete.
postMetadata.orderingHint: All steps after the first metadataSync step.

auditCheck.description: Calls core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncOrNot.

targetLock.description: Sets contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=true).

metadataSync.description: Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

pipelineRegister.description: POST to agent /pipeline/register for contract pipeline subject.

contractUndeploy.description: Runs core.uspUndeployMarkedContract on target for the contract entity.

targetUnlock.description: Clears contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=false).

contractPreScript.description: Runs core.uspRunContractDeploymentScripts with action Run preScript.

contractCreateStageDataset.description: Creates the contract stage dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=stage).

contractCreateArchiveDataset.description: Creates the contract archive dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=archive).

contractCreateListDataset.description: Creates the contract list dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=list).

contractCreateDimDataset.description: Creates the contract dim dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=dim).

contractCreateFactDataset.description: Creates the contract fact dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=fact).

contractCreateDatasetFks.description: Runs core.uspCreateDatasetFKs after dataset layers exist.

contractDeployEtl.description: Runs core.uspDeployETL2CustomTransformation for the contract on target.

contractDeployRoutine.description: Runs core.uspDeployRoutine for the contract on target.

contractPostScript.description: Runs core.uspRunContractDeploymentScripts with action Run postScript.

syncDate.description: core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncDate.

deployDate.description: core.uspAuditRunCheck on target with action deployDate.

auditObjectType.description: Contract / Dataset / Rule label for audit gate procedures (@objType). Typed on each flow step.

contractName.description: Contract name on target after metadata sync (core.Contract.name for plan entity id).

resolver.query: SELECT [name] AS name FROM core.Contract WHERE contractId = @entityId

contractPipelineId.description: Target SQL: pipelineId from core.Pipeline for the synced contract.

resolver.query: SELECT pipelineId FROM core.Pipeline WHERE contractId = @entityId

planEntityId.description: Numeric id of the entity being synced (contractId, datasetId, ruleId, …). Same for every step in the run.

dataset.description: Dataset sync definition bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.

notes: Managed via entity registry + sync admin.

tables.predicate: datasetId_Left IN ({ids})

tables.name: core.RuleCondition

tables.name: core.RuleLink

tables.name: core.Step
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Pipeline] p WHERE p.pipelineId = [core].[Step].pipelineId AND p.datasetId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleCondition] p WHERE p.ruleConditionId = [core].[RuleConditionValue].ruleConditionId)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Dataset] AS __mia_root WHERE __mia_root.[datasetId] = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: gate.MetaTable
tables.predicate: tableId = {id}

tables.name: gate.jsonSchema
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gate].[MetaColumn] mc INNER JOIN [gate].[MetaView] mv ON mv.[viewId] = mc.[viewId] WHERE mv.[tableId] = {id} AND mc.[jsonSchemaId] = [gate].[jsonSchema].[jsonSchemaId])

tables.name: gate.MetaView
tables.predicate: tableId = {id}

tables.name: gate.ContentLink
tables.predicate: (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gate].[Content] p WHERE p.contentId = [gate].[ContentLink].contentId)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gate].[MetaTable] AS __mia_root WHERE __mia_root.[tableId] = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDataListObjectsTran body.

tables.name: gate.UserGroupPermission

tables.name: core.Dataset
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = [core].[Dataset].[datasetId] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = [core].[Dataset].[datasetId])

tables.name: core.DatasetMapping
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] dm INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] WHERE dm.[datasetMappingId] = [core].[DatasetMapping].[datasetMappingId])

tables.name: core.DatasetColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = [core].[DatasetColumn].[datasetId] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = [core].[DatasetColumn].[datasetId])

tables.name: core.DatasetMappingColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] dm INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] WHERE dm.[datasetMappingId] = [core].[DatasetMappingColumn].[datasetMappingId])

tables.name: core.RuleLinkType
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleLink] rl INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[ruleId] = rl.[ruleId] WHERE rl.[ruleLinkTypeId] = [core].[RuleLinkType].[ruleLinkTypeId])

tables.name: core.RuleType
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleTypeId] = [core].[RuleType].[ruleTypeId])

tables.name: core.Rule
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[Rule].[ruleId])

tables.name: core.RuleLink
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[RuleLink].[ruleId])

tables.name: core.RuleCondition
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[RuleCondition].[ruleId])

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleCondition] rc INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[ruleId] = rc.[ruleId] WHERE rc.[ruleConditionId] = [core].[RuleConditionValue].[ruleConditionId])

tables.name: core.RuleColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[RuleColumn].[ruleId])
